detailedNotes: F-03: tw-framework-front GroupedHeaderGrid.tsx is TOMIS base repo (outside worktree boundary). Spec Section 6.5 C-34 note correctly identifies this. Implementation treats as alias re-export (surgical, 2-line replacement of 185-line original). Preserves C-17 external API surface. Content verification via Read tool confirms alias wiring correct.

C-17 visual regression preservation: legacy/GroupedHeaderGrid.tsx explicitly ports tbody (L133-161) and pagination (L165-204) classNames from L0 (tw-framework-front original). 6 critical class groups preserved: (1) wrapper 'flex flex-col', (2) container 'overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border', (3) table 'min-w-full text-sm', (4) tbody 'bg-white divide-y', (5) row hover + cursor, (6) pagination button classes. thead delegates to MultiRowHeader (inherits G-002 sticky/frozen Tailwind already verified at 100/90 in G-002 verify).

C-29 exactOptionalPropertyTypes: legacy wrapper L131 uses conditional spread `{...(enableGroupToggle === true ? { enableGroupToggle: true } : {})}` for enableGroupToggle (correct, avoids undefined). MultiRowHeader props destructured L97-101 (enableGroupToggle?: boolean, optional). No undefined assignment to non-optional fields.
